scripts.build: echo 'Static site — no build step required'
scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8')+fs.readFileSync('app.js','utf8');const checks=[['delete modal HTML','modal-delete-guest'],['delete password input','delete-guest-pass'],['delete confirm button','delete-confirm'],['delete JS handler','openDeleteConfirmModal'],['delete cleans confirmedYes','confirmedYes = confirmedYes.filter']];let ok=true;checks.forEach(([label,token])=>{if(!h.includes(token)){console.error('FAIL: missing '+label+' ('+token+')');ok=false;}else{console.log('PASS: '+label);}});if(!ok)process.exit(1);else console.log('All checks passed.');"
